name: Aggregate Agent with LLM Intent (granite3.3:2b) v5

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'granite3.3:2b', prompt: 'Classify the following homelab monitoring message into exactly one intent word.

Available intents:
- temp: temperature, heat, cooling, thermal, overheating
- cpu: CPU, processor, load, compute, utilization
- memory: RAM, swap, memory, heap, out-of-memory
- disk: storage, disk, space, volume, partition
- full: general status, multiple topics, or anything else

Rules: reply with ONE word only (temp / cpu / memory / disk / full). No explanation, no punctuation.

User message: ' + ($input.first().json.message?.text || ''), stream: false }) }}

nodes.name: LLM Classify Intent
nodes.notes: Calls local Ollama (gemma2:2b) to classify user intent. Returns one of: temp | cpu | memory | disk | full.

nodes.name: Parse LLM Intent
nodes.notes: Normalises LLM output to one of: temp | cpu | memory | disk | full. Falls back to 'full' for unrecognised output.

nodes.name: LLM Generate Temp Reply
nodes.notes: Calls Ollama to generate a natural language thermal status sentence.

nodes.name: Parse LLM Temp Reply
nodes.notes: Combines the structured header with the LLM-generated sentence.

nodes.name: LLM Generate CPU/RAM Reply
nodes.notes: Calls Ollama to generate a natural language CPU or RAM status sentence.

nodes.name: Parse LLM CPU/RAM Reply
nodes.notes: Combines the structured header with the LLM-generated sentence.

nodes.name: LLM Generate Disk Reply
nodes.notes: Calls Ollama to generate a natural language storage status sentence.

nodes.name: Parse LLM Disk Reply
nodes.notes: Combines the structured header with the LLM-generated sentence.

nodes.name: Aggregate Full Metrics
nodes.notes: Reads all 3 fetch results and builds header + LLM prompt for the full report.

nodes.name: LLM Generate Full Reply
nodes.notes: Calls Ollama for a holistic 2-3 sentence health summary.

nodes.name: Parse LLM Full Reply
nodes.notes: Combines structured header with the LLM health summary.
